twitter.content:
Let us know what you think!
Let us know what you think!


Thariq (@trq212)

We just released Claude Code channels, which allows you to control your Claude Code session through select MCPs, starting with Telegram and Discord. 

Use this to message Claude Code directly from your phone.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/trq212/status/2034761016320696565#m

RT by @bcherny: Claude Cowork is mind-blowing.

I still cannot believe you can do this on your phone and then come back to your computer to a complete report on the best plane tickets to buy.

I wonder where we'll be by the end of the year.
Claude Cowork is mind-blowing.

I still cannot believe you can do this on your phone and then come back to your computer to a complete report on the best plane tickets to buy.

I wonder where we'll be by the end of the year.

RT by @bcherny: A few 🔥 Claude Code VSCode drops

1. Remote Control in VSCode
A few 🔥 Claude Code VSCode drops

1. Remote Control in VSCode

RT by @bcherny: And another thing... Skills and a bunch of /slash commands (/clear, /compact) etc now work over mobile in Remote Control.  As a heads up we dont have auto-complete yet so better get those spelling-bee skills sharpened :)  

Update to latest cc & mobile
And another thing... Skills and a bunch of /slash commands (/clear, /compact) etc now work over mobile in Remote Control.  As a heads up we dont have auto-complete yet so better get those spelling-bee skills sharpened :)  

Update

RT by @bcherny: Our developer conference Code with Claude returns this spring, this time in San Francisco, London, and Tokyo. 

Join us for a full day of workshops, demos, and 1:1 office hours with teams behind Claude.

Register to watch from anywhere or apply to attend: https://claude.com/code-with-claude

Join us for a full day of workshops, demos, and 1:1 office hours with teams behi

Can’t wait for this!

Claude (@claudeai)

Our developer conference Code with Claude returns this spring, this time in San Francisco, London, and Tokyo. 

Join us for a full day of workshops, demos, and 1:1 office hours with teams behind Claude.

RT by @bcherny: heard you like context?

Opus 4.6 1M context is out for Max/Teams/Enterprise on desktop
heard you like context?

Opus 4.6 1M context is out for Max/Teams/Enterprise on desktop

RT by @bcherny: We've been building an internal Claude Code plugin system at Intercom with 13 plugins, 100+ skills, and hooks that turn Claude into a full-stack engineering platform. Lots done, more to do. Here's a thread of some highlights.
We've been building an internal Claude Code plugin system at Intercom with 13 plugins, 100+ skills, and hooks that turn Claude into a full-stack engineering platform. Lots done, more to do. Here's a thread of some highlights.

You can now touch grass in Cowork, too 👏
You can now touch grass in Cowork, too 👏


Felix Rieseberg (@felixrieseberg)

We're shipping a new feature in Claude Cowork as a research preview that I'm excited about: Dispatch!

One persistent conversation with Claude that runs on your computer. Message it from your phone. Come back to finished work. 

To try it out, download Claude Desktop, then pair your phone.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/felixrieseberg/status/2034005731457044577#m

Really great writeup
Really great writeup


Thariq (@trq212)

x.com/i/article/203377262153…

RT by @bcherny: Btw you can add `context: fork` to run a skill in an isolated subagent. The main context only sees the final result, not the intermediate tool calls

It gets a fresh context window with CLAUDE.md + your skill as the prompt. The `agent` field even lets you set the subagent type!
Btw you can add `context: fork` to run a skill in an isolated subagent. The main context only sees the final result, not the intermediate tool calls

It gets a fresh context window with CLAUDE.md + your sk

RT by @bcherny: Three years ago today.
Three years ago today.

R to @bcherny: Quick thank you to everyone who's been building with Claude Code, both the early crowd and everyone who showed up this year. It’s only thanks to your feedback that we can make the product a little better every day.
Quick thank you to everyone who's been building with Claude Code, both the early crowd and everyone who showed up this year. It’s only thanks to your feedback that we can make the product a little better every day.

We doubled Claude usage on weekends, and outside 5–11am PT on weekdays for the next 2 weeks.
We doubled Claude usage on weekends, and outside 5–11am PT on weekdays for the next 2 weeks.


Claude (@claudeai)

A small thank you to everyone using Claude: We’re doubling usage outside our peak hours for the next two weeks.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/claudeai/status/2032911276226257206#m

RT by @bcherny: Starting today, Claude no longer defaults to text. Claude is learning to choose the best medium for each response — based on the task, the data, and what's most useful for the person. Give it a try!
Starting today, Claude no longer defaults to text. Claude is learning to choose the best medium for each response — based on the task, the data, and what's most useful for the person. Give it a try!


Claude (@claudeai)

Claude can now build interactive charts and diagrams, directly i

RT by @bcherny: A few end of week ships:

You can now set effort to 'max' which reasons for longer and uses as many tokens as needed. This will spend your usage limits more quickly so you have to activate it per session. 

Hit /effort to try it.
A few end of week ships:

You can now set effort to 'max' which reasons for longer and uses as many tokens as needed. This will spend your usage limits more quickly so you have to activate it per session. 

Hit /effort to try it.

Video

🤯 You can now launch Claude Code sessions on your laptop *from your phone*

This blew my mind the first time I tried it

Noah Zweben (@noahzweben)

Remote Control - Session Spawning:
Run claude remote-control and then spawn a NEW local session in the mobile app.

* Out to Max, Team, and Enterprise (>=2.1.74)
*Have GH set up on mobile (relaxing soon)
* Working on speeding up

R to @bcherny: Personally, I've been using exclusively 1M context for the last few months and loving it.

You can also customize your auto-compact threshold with the CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW env var.

More here: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/model-config
Personally, I've been using exclusively 1M context for the last few months and loving it.

You can also customize your auto-compact threshold with the CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW env var.

More here: code.claude.com/docs/en/mode…

🎁 Happy Friday - Opus 4.6 1M is now the default Opus model for Claude Code users on Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.

Pro and Sonnet users can opt in with /extra-usage.
🎁 Happy Friday - Opus 4.6 1M is now the default Opus model for Claude Code users on Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.

Pro and Sonnet users can opt in with /extra-usage.


Claude (@claudeai)
